story.title: Fidji Simo steps down from leading OpenAI’s AGI work due to illness
story.summary: OpenAI's Fidji Simo is departing her full-time role as the company's AGI chief and is transitioning to being a "part-time advisor," she said on X. The news follows Simo's original announcement in April that she would take a few weeks of medical leave due to a neuroimmune condition, shortly after she had taken on the […]

points.heading: Simo Steps Down from AGI
points.detail: Fidji Simo is departing her full-time role as OpenAI’s AGI chief, transitioning to a part-time advisor position.

points.heading: Medical Leave for Illness
points.detail: Simo took medical leave due to a severe exacerbation of a chronic neuroimmune condition, requiring her full focus.

points.heading: Other C-suite Changes
points.detail: COO Brad Lightcap stepped down to focus on special projects, and CMO Kate Rouch stepped down for her health.

points.heading: OpenAI Reorganization
points.detail: OpenAI underwent a reorganization in May, with Greg Brockman officially taking charge of product strategy and scaling efforts.
